message:
chore: add agent session ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for common agent-generated ephemeral files that should
never be committed: SESSION_TODO.md, SESSION_REPORT.md, SESSION_*.md,
verify_*.sh, newfile.txt, repro_*.rs.

These patterns cover the most common ephemeral files that agents create
during debugging sessions and forget to clean up, preventing them from
accidentally being committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -94,3 +94,11 @@ LIST_OF_INPUT_MESSAGES.md
 ci-artifacts/
 proptest-regressions/
 test_meminfo
+
+# Agent session ephemeral files
+SESSION_TODO.md
+SESSION_REPORT.md
+SESSION_*.md
+verify_*.sh
+newfile.txt
+repro_*.rs
